jsonLd.title: IndiaPost is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndiaPost! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndiaPost:
IndiaPost is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaPost!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
